speaker: speaker1
text: what's wrong , Jerry ? You look so upset .

speaker: speaker2
text: to be honest , I was just dumped .

speaker: speaker1
text: oh , I'm sorry to hear that . You can go on a holiday to cheer you up .

speaker: speaker2
text: no , thanks . I'm not in the mood for traveling .

speaker: speaker1
text: come on . A trip will do you good . Are you doing anything this weekend ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I was planning on doing a lot of wallowing .

speaker: speaker1
text: well , my friends and I are planning on going to Shangri-La on Saturday . Do you want to come with us ?

speaker: speaker1
text: not very far from here . We'll fly . It's about one and a half hours .

speaker: speaker1
text: there is a large canyon , vast grasslands , ancient forests and mountain lakes .

speaker: speaker1
text: yes , the scenery there is breathtaking . I have some pictures at home . You can come over and take a look if you like .

speaker: speaker2
text: ok . Then I can make up my mind .
